Joseph Lake, esq., City and County of San Frnacisco, appearing for Defendant City of San Francisco
No other appearance.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to both causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Auliya Hughes is sustained without leave to amend as to both causes of action. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
